name: dependency_health
description:
Assess health of project dependencies — version freshness, deprecation status, known CVEs across npm, Rust, Python, and Go. Auto-detects from lock files.

Returns a health score (0-100), outdated/deprecated/vulnerable counts, and per-dependency details including semver distance and registry metadata.

Privacy: sends only package names (public manifest data). No code or personal data transmitted.

include_dev.description: Include devDependencies in health check. Default: false.

ecosystem_filter.description: Only show dependencies from this ecosystem.

sort_by.description: Sort order. 'risk' prioritizes vulnerable+deprecated+outdated. Default: risk.
